ratingDrivers.description: Balance invariants hold across every tested mutation path with zero reconciliation drift.
The reconciliation job traces every sampled balance delta to one ordered ledger event.

localAnalysis.rationale: Two independent sensors show balance preservation with margin: property coverage and zero reconciliation drift.
